stat.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos
stat.subtitle: Pinch appearances ending in hit, HBP, HR, or K.

notableEvents.label: Tyler O'Neill pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Tyler O'Neill called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Jacob Gonzalez pinch-hit · Strikeout
notableEvents.detail: Jacob Gonzalez strikes out swinging.

notableEvents.label: Ivan Johnson pinch-hit · Walk
notableEvents.detail: Ivan Johnson walks.

notableEvents.label: Ben Malgeri pinch-hit · Double
notableEvents.detail: Ben Malgeri doubles (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Lawrence Butler. Zach McKinstry scores. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd.
